001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.database;
002
003import android.content.Context;
004import androidx.room.Room;
005import dagger.Module;
006import dagger.Provides;
007import dagger.hilt.InstallIn;
008import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
009import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.BatchDao;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.CandlingObservationDao;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggDao;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggGroupDao;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.IncubatorDao;
015import javax.inject.Singleton;
016
017@Module
018@InstallIn(SingletonComponent.class)
019public class DatabaseModule {
020
021  @Provides
022  @Singleton
023  public PipPipDatabase provideDatabase(@ApplicationContext Context context) {
024    return Room.databaseBuilder(
025            context,
026            PipPipDatabase.class,
027            PipPipDatabase.NAME
028        )
029        .fallbackToDestructiveMigration(true)
030        .build();
031  }
032
033  @Provides
034  @Singleton
035  public BatchDao provideBatchDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
036    return database.getBatchDao();
037  }
038
039  @Provides
040  @Singleton
041  public CandlingObservationDao provideCandlingObservationDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
042    return database.getCandlingObservationDao();
043  }
044
045  @Provides
046  @Singleton
047  public EggDao provideEggDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
048    return database.getEggDao();
049  }
050
051  @Provides
052  @Singleton
053  public EggGroupDao provideEggGroupDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
054    return database.getEggGroupDao();
055  }
056
057  @Provides
058  @Singleton
059  public IncubatorDao provideIncubatorDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
060    return database.getIncubatorDao();
061  }
062
063}
